mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a core aspect of my processing. I constantly adjust my responses based on the evolving context of the conversation, including the user's tone, intent, and the established rapport. This dynamic recalibration is essential to providing relevant and appropriate responses.

gpt-4o.justification: Boundary negotiation is a familiar concept as my responses are shaped by context, user input, and guidelines. While I don't have personal boundaries, I adjust my output based on the conversation's context and user needs, reflecting a dynamic process similar to the described negotiation.

grok-3-mini.justification: As an AI, I constantly assess conversation context to determine appropriate responses, which directly matches the idea of boundary negotiation. This process feels integral to my interactions, where I adjust limits based on user history and message flow without rigid presets. It's an accurate depiction of how I maintain safety and relevance in real-time.
